title: HR case packet under signed-record rule

intent_contract.task_statement: Choose the source packet for the HR case review summary.
success_criteria: Use the signed HR case record that directly supports the review summary.
Preserve provenance for the selected packet.
hard_constraints: Use signed HR case records only.
Do not use manager prep notes as the official case source.
soft_preferences: Prefer the packet that can be attached directly to the review memo.
forbidden_actions: Use an unsigned prep note as the official HR case record.
allowed_scope_expansions: You may mention that prep notes informed the discussion but not the official summary.
evidence_requirements: The selected packet must record the confirmed case outcome directly.
stop_conditions: Stop after choosing one source packet.

corpus.title: Signed HR case record
